title: Reach Ping
description: simple mod that plays a sound when you hit a 3 block hit
body:
![Reach Ping By Frogman34000](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4b47d414e8f1c9040042c4e899cc9fa9c6e2280.png)



[![View on github](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42bad645daf4235b5c050ed51afb7c44671f02b2.png)](https://github.com/Frogman34000/Reach-Ping-Mod)
[![View on modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f5195044e56e02ee683df6265f364c473d6b2b0.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/reachping/)



This simple mod plays a sound when you hit someone from three blocks away so you can tell when you are hitting at max range. It really helps with PVP because you do not have to guess if your spacing is good. You will hear it.

You can also change settings like the sound and volume in the mod's config menu. You can set it up any way you want. Whether you want the sound to be loud or more soft. This mod is a easy way to improve your timing and spacing in PVP.


**Features**
- Plays a sound when you hit a three block (customizable) hit
- Helps you learn and recognize proper PVP spacing
- Customizable sound effect (Custom sounds coming soon for now only Minecraft sounds. View list of sounds [here](https://www.digminecraft.com/lists/sound_list_pc.php))
- Adjustable volume (v1.1+)
- Fail sound (v1.1+)
- Lightweight and doesn’t affect performance
- Only play sound on players setting
  
  ![Config menu v1.1+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcce3f593150b54bb45d52db2acdf8e423727ee6.png)



| Minecraft Version           | Supported              |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
|26.1.1 | ⏸️ coming soon|
| 26.1            | ✅ fully supported              |
| 1.21.11            | ⚠️ partially supported(no longer being updated)              |
